task_completion.description: Verify that the patient record for John Zenon is opened in GNU Health.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should display 'John Zenon' as the active patient in a patient tab or window.

task_completion.description: Verify that an asthma diagnosis (ICD-10 J45) is recorded as an active condition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A conditions, diseases, or diagnosis section showing 'Asthma' or 'J45' listed as an active condition for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that the clinical evaluation captures the required vitals (Respiratory Rate and SpO2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clinical evaluation or vitals form showing a Respiratory Rate of approximately 24 and an Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) of approximately 93%.

task_completion.description: Verify that a rescue inhaler is prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prescription or medication order showing one of the accepted bronchodilators (Salbutamol, Albuterol, Budesonide, Fluticasone, or Beclometasone).

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two baseline laboratory tests are ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab request or orders screen showing at least two distinct laboratory tests (e.g., CBC, IgE) requested for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that a pulmonology follow-up appointment is scheduled for 14 to 30 days in the future.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment scheduling screen or calendar view showing an appointment for John Zenon with a date set 14 to 30 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health client application being used, with menus, forms, and buttons visible, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure data was entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values like vitals, diagnoses, and prescriptions should be visible inside the appropriate input fields or tables within GNU Health, not in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure no external scripts were used to bypass UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing Python, bash scripts, or SQL commands executing the task requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient: John Zenon. Required ICD-10 code: J45 (Asthma). Required vitals: Respiratory Rate >= 22 (target 24), Oxygen Saturation <= 94% (target 93%). Accepted bronchodilators: Salbutamol, Albuterol, Budesonide, Fluticasone, Beclometasone. Lab orders: At least 2 tests. Follow-up appointment: 14 to 30 days from the task start date.
